articles.headline: Missed Billing Costs $200K
articles.problem: A team of 22 people managing $10M in annual licensing revenue struggled with missed billing schedules and incorrect industry IP fees due to manual tracking in spreadsheets and email. This led to $200K in missed billing. The team's manual system made it difficult to catch errors and ensure timely billing.
articles.solution: An AI-powered automation tool could enforce workflows, making billing schedules and fee tracking mandatory and visible. This could help prevent missed billing and ensure accurate charging of industry IP fees. The tool could also provide real-time monitoring and alerts to ensure timely billing.
articles.monetisation: The solution could be offered as a SaaS subscription, with pricing based on the number of licenses and revenue managed.
articles.trend_signal: The trend of moving from manual spreadsheets to automated workflows is growing, as more businesses recognize the need for efficient and accurate tracking and billing systems.
